posts.author: liorke (Lior Kedem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
Happy to anounce that we released the Leftpane-Dashboard-Right-Click feature to all accounts.

What does it include?
Ability to right-click on the dashboards on the leftpane, while allowing the users to:

  1. Open the dashboard in a new tab
  2. Open the dashboard in full-screen
  3. Add/Remove to/from favorites
  4. Rename the dashboard
  5. Delete the dashboard

    As expected, this menu is enabled for every item on the list, not only to the one currently viewing.
    Enjoy
